# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "MR Title in Commit Message: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Title in Deployment Tag: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - .

release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Release Notes:" >> release_notes.txt
    - echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" >> release_notes.txt
    - echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" >> release_notes.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release_notes.txt
